## Summary

Describe the change clearly and briefly.

## Evidence

- What problem was observed?
- What code path, test, trace, or repro supports this change?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Affected component

- [ ] brain
- [ ] swarm
- [ ] evolution
- [ ] node runner
- [ ] rust bridge
- [ ] docker / deploy
- [ ] documentation

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests or smoke checks were run
- [ ] Python files compile successfully
- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed
- [ ] No secrets were added
- [ ] No absolute local paths were introduced
- [ ] Public debug docs were updated if contributor-facing behavior changed

## Public debug safety

- [ ] No `.env`, logs, memory stores, databases, or private datasets were added
- [ ] Any screenshots, logs, or traces included in the PR were reviewed for secrets and personal data
